fill="#808495"></path></svg></div></h2><div class="code-desc"><p>Display a file uploader widget.</p>
<p>By default, uploaded files are limited to 200 MB each. You can
configure this globally using the <tt class="docutils literal">server.maxUploadSize</tt> configuration
option. For more information on how to set configuration options, see
<a class="reference external" href="https://docs.streamlit.io/develop/api-reference/configuration/config.toml"><tt class="docutils literal">config.toml</tt></a>. Additionally, you can set a per-widget limit using the
<tt class="docutils literal">max_upload_size</tt> parameter.</p>
</div></div><section class="table_TableContainer__JWglo"><table class="full-width table_Table__xjBId"><thead><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM table_HeadingRow__zGCcZ"><th class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_TitleCell__m1zdo" colspan="2">Function signature<a href="https://github.com/streamlit/streamlit/blob/1.56.0/lib/streamlit/elements/widgets/file_uploader.py#L251" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" title="View st.file_uploader source code on GitHub">[source]</a></th></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><th class="table_Cell__NwRF3" colspan="2"><p class="code"> st.file_uploader(label, type=None, accept_multiple_files=False, key=None, help=None, on_change=None, args=None, kwargs=None, *, max_upload_size=None, disabled=False, label_visibility="visible", width="stretch")</p> </th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM table_HeadingRow__zGCcZ"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_TitleCell__m1zdo" colspan="2">Parameters</td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">label</span>
          <span class="italic code">(str)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>A short label explaining to the user what this file uploader is for.
The label can optionally contain GitHub-flavored Markdown of the
following types: Bold, Italics, Strikethroughs, Inline Code, Links,
and Images. Images display like icons, with a max height equal to
the font height.</p>
<p>Unsupported Markdown elements are unwrapped so only their children
(text contents) render. Common block-level Markdown (headings,
lists, blockquotes) is automatically escaped and displays as
literal text in labels.</p>
<p>See the <tt class="docutils literal">body</tt> parameter of <a class="reference external" href="https://docs.streamlit.io/develop/api-reference/text/st.markdown"><tt class="docutils literal">st.markdown</tt></a> for additional,
supported Markdown directives.</p>
<p>For accessibility reasons, you should never set an empty label, but
you can hide it with <tt class="docutils literal">label_visibility</tt> if needed. In the future,
we may disallow empty labels by raising an exception.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">type</span>
          <span class="italic code">(str, list of str, or None)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>The allowed file types for uploaded files. This can be one of the
following values:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><tt class="docutils literal">None</tt> (default): All file extensions are allowed.</li>
<li>A file extension: Only one file extension is allowed. For example,
to only accept CSV files, use <tt class="docutils literal">"csv"</tt> or <tt class="docutils literal">".csv"</tt>.</li>
<li>A MIME type: Only one MIME type is allowed. For example,
to accept JPEG images, use <tt class="docutils literal">"image/jpeg"</tt>.</li>
<li>A MIME wildcard: All types within a MIME media type are allowed.
For example, to accept all images, use <tt class="docutils literal"><span class="pre">"image/*"</span></tt>.</li>
<li>A MIME media type: This is a shortcut that is equivalent to a
MIME wildcard. If you use <tt class="docutils literal">"image"</tt>, <tt class="docutils literal">"audio"</tt>, <tt class="docutils literal">"video"</tt>, or
<tt class="docutils literal">"text"</tt>, Streamlit will internally append <tt class="docutils literal">/*</tt> to create
a MIME wildcard.</li>
<li>A sequence of strings: Use a combination of the previously listed
strings to accept multiple file types.</li>
</ul>
<p>For more information about MIME types, see
<a class="reference external" href="https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml">https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml</a>.</p>
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="first admonition-title">Note</p>
<p class="last">This is a best-effort check, but doesn't provide a
security guarantee against users uploading files of other types
or type extensions. The correct handling of uploaded files is
part of the app developer's responsibility.</p>
</div>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          autofunction_Keyword__c8FQ_
        ">
          <span class="bold">max_upload_size</span>
          <span class="italic code">(int or None)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>The maximum allowed size of each uploaded file in megabytes.</p>
<p>If this is <tt class="docutils literal">None</tt> (default), the maximum file size is set by the
<tt class="docutils literal">server.maxUploadSize</tt> configuration option in your
<tt class="docutils literal">config.toml</tt> file. If this is an integer, it must be positive
and will override the <tt class="docutils literal">server.maxUploadSize</tt> configuration option.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">accept_multiple_files</span>
          <span class="italic code">(bool or "directory")</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>Whether to accept more than one file in a submission. This can be one
of the following values:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><tt class="docutils literal">False</tt> (default): The user can only submit one file at a time.</li>
<li><tt class="docutils literal">True</tt>: The user can upload multiple files at the same time.</li>
<li><tt class="docutils literal">"directory"</tt>: The user can select a directory to upload all
files in the directory and its subdirectories. If <tt class="docutils literal">type</tt> is
set, only files matching those type(s) will be uploaded.</li>
</ul>
<p>When this is <tt class="docutils literal">True</tt> or <tt class="docutils literal">"directory"</tt>, the return value will be
a list and a user can additively select files if they click the
browse button on the widget multiple times.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">key</span>
          <span class="italic code">(str, int, or None)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>An optional string or integer to use as the unique key for
the widget. If this is <tt class="docutils literal">None</tt> (default), a key will be
generated for the widget based on the values of the other
parameters. No two widgets may have the same key. Assigning
a key stabilizes the widget's identity and preserves its
state across reruns even when other parameters change.</p>
<div class="admonition note">
<p class="first admonition-title">Note</p>
<p class="last">Changing <tt class="docutils literal">type</tt>, <tt class="docutils literal">accept_multiple_files</tt>, or
<tt class="docutils literal">max_upload_size</tt> resets the widget even when a key is
provided.</p>
</div>
<p>A key lets you access the widget's value via
<tt class="docutils literal">st.session_state[key]</tt> (read-only). For more details, see
<a class="reference external" href="https://docs.streamlit.io/develop/concepts/architecture/widget-behavior">Widget behavior</a>.</p>
<p>Additionally, if <tt class="docutils literal">key</tt> is provided, it will be used as a
CSS class name prefixed with <tt class="docutils literal"><span class="pre">st-key-</span></tt>.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">help</span>
          <span class="italic code">(str or None)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>A tooltip that gets displayed next to the widget label. Streamlit
only displays the tooltip when <tt class="docutils literal"><span class="pre">label_visibility="visible"</span></tt>. If
this is <tt class="docutils literal">None</tt> (default), no tooltip is displayed.</p>
<p>The tooltip can optionally contain GitHub-flavored Markdown,
including the Markdown directives described in the <tt class="docutils literal">body</tt>
parameter of <tt class="docutils literal">st.markdown</tt>.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">on_change</span>
          <span class="italic code">(callable)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>An optional callback invoked when this file_uploader's value
changes.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">args</span>
          <span class="italic code">(list or tuple)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>An optional list or tuple of args to pass to the callback.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          
        ">
          <span class="bold">kwargs</span>
          <span class="italic code">(dict)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>An optional dict of kwargs to pass to the callback.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          autofunction_Keyword__c8FQ_
        ">
          <span class="bold">disabled</span>
          <span class="italic code">(bool)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>An optional boolean that disables the file uploader if set to
<tt class="docutils literal">True</tt>. The default is <tt class="docutils literal">False</tt>.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          autofunction_Keyword__c8FQ_
        ">
          <span class="bold">label_visibility</span>
          <span class="italic code">("visible", "hidden", or "collapsed")</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>The visibility of the label. The default is <tt class="docutils literal">"visible"</tt>. If this
is <tt class="docutils literal">"hidden"</tt>, Streamlit displays an empty spacer instead of the
label, which can help keep the widget aligned with other widgets.
If this is <tt class="docutils literal">"collapsed"</tt>, Streamlit displays no label or spacer.</p>

      </div></td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div>
        <p class="
          
          autofunction_Keyword__c8FQ_
        ">
          <span class="bold">width</span>
          <span class="italic code">("stretch" or int)</span>
        </p>
      </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div>
        
        <p>The width of the file uploader widget. This can be one of the
following:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><tt class="docutils literal">"stretch"</tt> (default): The width of the widget matches the
width of the parent container.</li>
<li>An integer specifying the width in pixels: The widget has a
fixed width. If the specified width is greater than the width of
the parent container, the width of the widget matches the width
of the parent container.</li>
</ul>

      </div></td></tr></tbody><tfoot><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM table_HeadingRow__zGCcZ"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_TitleCell__m1zdo" colspan="2">Returns</td></tr><tr class="table_Row__tz8tM"><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_SmallCell__b_IbF"><div><p><span class="italic code">(None, UploadedFile, or list of UploadedFile)</span></p> </div> </td><td class="table_Cell__NwRF3 table_BigCell__wOqnZ"><div><ul class="simple">
<li>If accept_multiple_files is <tt class="docutils literal">False</tt>, returns either <tt class="docutils literal">None</tt> or
an <tt class="docutils literal">UploadedFile</tt> object.</li>
<li>If accept_multiple_files is <tt class="docutils literal">True</tt> or <tt class="docutils literal">"directory"</tt>, returns
a list with the uploaded files as <tt class="docutils literal">UploadedFile</tt> objects. If no
files were uploaded, returns an empty list.</li>
</ul>
<p>The <tt class="docutils literal">UploadedFile</tt> class is a subclass of <tt class="docutils literal">BytesIO</tt>, and
therefore is "file-like". This means you can pass an instance of it
anywhere a file is expected.</p>
 </div></td></tr></tfoot></table><section><h4 class="table_TitleCell__m1zdo" colspan="2">Examples</h4><section><p><strong>Example 1: Accept a single file at a time</strong></p>
<div class="autofunction_CodeBlockContainer__QxTAN"><div class="autofunction_Header__D6UA3 code-block-header"><span class="autofunction_Language__3sstE">Python</span></div><div class="code-toolbar"><pre class="doctest-block line-numbers language-python" tabindex="0"><code class="language-python"><span class="token keyword">import</span> streamlit <span class="token keyword">as</span> st
<span class="token keyword">import</span> pandas <span class="token keyword">as</span> pd
<span class="token keyword">from</span> io <span class="token keyword">import</span> StringIO

uploaded_file <span class="token operator">=</span> st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>file_uploader<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"Choose a file"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
<span class="token keyword">if</span> uploaded_file <span class="token keyword">is</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> <span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
    <span class="token comment"># To read file as bytes:</span>
    bytes_data <span class="token operator">=</span> uploaded_file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>getvalue<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>bytes_data<span class="token punctuation">)</span>

    <span class="token comment"># To convert to a string based IO:</span>
    stringio <span class="token operator">=</span> StringIO<span class="token punctuation">(</span>uploaded_file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>getvalue<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>decode<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"utf-8"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>stringio<span class="token punctuation">)</span>

    <span class="token comment"># To read file as string:</span>
    string_data <span class="token operator">=</span> stringio<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>string_data<span class="token punctuation">)</span>

    <span class="token comment"># Can be used wherever a "file-like" object is accepted:</span>
    dataframe <span class="token operator">=</span> pd<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read_csv<span class="token punctuation">(</span>uploaded_file<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>dataframe<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="line-numbers-rows"><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span></span></code></pre><div class="toolbar"><div class="toolbar-item"><button class="copy-to-clipboard-button" type="button" data-copy-state="copy"><span>Copy</span></button></div></div></div></div>
<p><strong>Example 2: Accept multiple files at a time</strong></p>
<div class="autofunction_CodeBlockContainer__QxTAN"><div class="autofunction_Header__D6UA3 code-block-header"><span class="autofunction_Language__3sstE">Python</span></div><div class="code-toolbar"><pre class="doctest-block line-numbers language-python" tabindex="0"><code class="language-python"><span class="token keyword">import</span> pandas <span class="token keyword">as</span> pd
<span class="token keyword">import</span> streamlit <span class="token keyword">as</span> st

uploaded_files <span class="token operator">=</span> st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>file_uploader<span class="token punctuation">(</span>
    <span class="token string">"Upload data"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> accept_multiple_files<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">type</span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">"csv"</span>
<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
<span class="token keyword">for</span> uploaded_file <span class="token keyword">in</span> uploaded_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
    df <span class="token operator">=</span> pd<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read_csv<span class="token punctuation">(</span>uploaded_file<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="line-numbers-rows"><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span></span></code></pre><div class="toolbar"><div class="toolbar-item"><button class="copy-to-clipboard-button" type="button" data-copy-state="copy"><span>Copy</span></button></div></div></div></div>
<section class="overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-gray-40 my-4 flex flex-col"><iframe src="https://doc-file-uploader.streamlit.app/~/+//?embed=true&embed_options=light_theme" allow="camera;microphone;clipboard-read;clipboard-write;" loading="lazy" class="w-full new" style="--ignore-me:42; height: 375px"></iframe><div class="flex flex-row px-3 py-1 bg-gray-20 text-xs tracking-[0.05em] text-gray-80 gap-16"><div class="flex-1"><a class="text-xs tracking-[0.05em] text-gray-80 hover:text-gray-70" href="https://streamlit.io" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Built with Streamlit 🎈</a></div><div><a href="https://doc-file-uploader.streamlit.app//?utm_medium=oembed&" class="text-xs tracking-[0.05em] text-gray-80 hover:text-gray-70 flex flex-row gap-1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Fullscreen <i class="text-xs">open_in_new</i></a></div></div></section><p><strong>Example 3: Accept an entire directory</strong></p>
<div class="autofunction_CodeBlockContainer__QxTAN"><div class="autofunction_Header__D6UA3 code-block-header"><span class="autofunction_Language__3sstE">Python</span></div><div class="code-toolbar"><pre class="doctest-block line-numbers language-python" tabindex="0"><code class="language-python"><span class="token keyword">import</span> streamlit <span class="token keyword">as</span> st

uploaded_files <span class="token operator">=</span> st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>file_uploader<span class="token punctuation">(</span>
    <span class="token string">"Upload images"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> accept_multiple_files<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">"directory"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">type</span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"jpg"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"png"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
<span class="token keyword">for</span> uploaded_file <span class="token keyword">in</span> uploaded_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
    st<span class="token punctuation">.</span>image<span class="token punctuation">(</span>uploaded_file<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="line-numbers-rows"><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span></span></code></pre><div class="toolbar"><div class="toolbar-item"><button class="copy-to-clipboard-button" type="button" data-copy-state="copy"><span>Copy</span></button></div></div></div></div>
<section class="overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-gray-40 my-4 flex flex-col"><iframe src="https://doc-file-uploader-directory.streamlit.app/~/+//?embed=true&embed_options=light_theme" allow="camera;microphone;clipboard-read;clipboard-write;" loading="lazy" class="w-full new" style="--ignore-me:42; id="ot-pvcy-hdr">Your Privacy</h4><p id="ot-pc-desc" class="ot-grp-desc">When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
            <br><a href="https://cookiepedia.co.uk/giving-consent-to-cookies" class="privacy-notice-link" rel="noopener" target="_blank" aria-label="More information about your privacy, opens in a new tab">More information</a></p></div><div class="ot-desc-cntr ot-hide ot-always-active-group" role="tabpanel" tabindex="0" id="ot-desc-id-C0001"><div class="ot-grp-hdr1"><h4 class="ot-cat-header">Strictly Necessary Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl-cntr"><div class="ot-always-active">Always Active</div></div></div><p class="ot-grp-desc ot-category-desc">These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.</p></div><div class="ot-desc-cntr ot-hide" role="tabpanel" tabindex="0" id="ot-desc-id-C0004"><div class="ot-grp-hdr1"><h4 class="ot-cat-header">Targeting Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl"><input type="checkbox" name="ot-group-id-C0004" id="ot-group-id-C0004" role="switch" class="category-switch-handler" data-optanongroupid="C0004" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0004"> <label class="ot-switch" for="ot-group-id-C0004"><span class="ot-switch-nob"></span> <span class="ot-label-txt">Targeting Cookies</span></label> </div><div class="ot-tgl-cntr"></div></div><p class="ot-grp-desc ot-category-desc">These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly identifiable personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.</p></div><div class="ot-desc-cntr ot-hide" role="tabpanel" tabindex="0" id="ot-desc-id-C0002"><div class="ot-grp-hdr1"><h4 class="ot-cat-header">Performance Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl"><input type="checkbox" name="ot-group-id-C0002" id="ot-group-id-C0002" role="switch" class="category-switch-handler" data-optanongroupid="C0002" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0002"> <label class="ot-switch" for="ot-group-id-C0002"><span class="ot-switch-nob"></span> <span class="ot-label-txt">Performance Cookies</span></label> </div><div class="ot-tgl-cntr"></div></div><p class="ot-grp-desc ot-category-desc">These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.</p></div><div class="ot-desc-cntr ot-hide" role="tabpanel" tabindex="0" id="ot-desc-id-C0003"><div class="ot-grp-hdr1"><h4 class="ot-cat-header">Functional Cookies</h4><div class="ot-tgl"><input type="checkbox" name="ot-group-id-C0003" id="ot-group-id-C0003" role="switch" class="category-switch-handler" data-optanongroupid="C0003" aria-labelledby="ot-header-id-C0003"> <label class="ot-switch" for="ot-group-id-C0003"><span class="ot-switch-nob"></span> <span class="ot-label-txt">Functional Cookies</span></label> </div><div class="ot-tgl-cntr"></div></div><p class="ot-grp-desc ot-category-desc">These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.</p></div></div></div></div><!-- Vendors / Hosts --><section id="ot-pc-lst" class="ot-hide ot-pc-scrollbar ot-enbl-chr"><div class="ot-lst-cntr ot-pc-scrollbar"><div id="ot-pc-hdr"><div id="ot-lst-title"><button class="ot-link-btn back-btn-handler" aria-label="Back"><svg id="ot-back-arw" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" x="0px" y="0px" viewBox="0 0 444.531 444.531" xml:space="preserve"><title>Back Button</title><g><path fill="#656565" d="M213.13,222.409L351.88,83.653c7.05-7.043,10.567-15.657,10.567-25.841c0-10.183-3.518-18.793-10.567-25.835
